description: SSHKeySpec controls the behavior of the ssh key generator.

comment.description: Comment specifies an optional comment for the SSH key

keySize.description: KeySize specifies the key size for RSA keys (default: 2048) For RSA keys: 2048, 3072, 4096 Ignored for ed25519 keys

keyType.description: KeyType specifies the SSH key type (rsa, ed25519)
